description: Maps GCP resource path patterns to their node type. Use regex_pattern for matching field values. Patterns are sorted most-specific first.

usage.field_matching: For each field value in a discovered resource, iterate patterns in order and apply regex_pattern. First match gives you the target generic_node_type.
